THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, STEVEN DBA ROCOCO HARMONY INC $1,384.08 PRINCIPAL, $50.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,435.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR FALSE ALARM FEES/PENALTIES PER NOTICES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY STEVEN HO SET FOR MAR-16-2009 IS CONTINUED TO APR-13-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR WITH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
